outcome_statement: An agent picks a real estate scenario, practices against an AI client that adapts to their personality quadrant, receives real-time coaching per turn, and gets a scored debrief at the end.
pain: Agents learn objection handling by losing real deals. There is no safe environment to practice the same scenario 20 times with personalized coaching.
value: Unlimited reps against calibrated AI clients, with a coach whispering in their ear every turn and a post-session debrief that identifies exactly what to change.
success_metrics: Scenario list returns 5 scenarios including expired_listing
End session returns debrief with scores.overall as a number
failure_metrics: agentTurn UPDATE fails because updated_at column missing
Session start fails with DB error
GET score endpoint returns 404 after completed session
constraints: Text simulator only — no live call listening in this BP
No UI in this BP — API-only Phase 1
Must execute after PRODUCT-SOCIALMEDIAOS-SESSION-MVP-0001 (SSM-007 wires register-runtime-routes.js which LSC-006 builds on)
scope_boundary: Per FOUNDER_PACKET.md — API-only, 5 scenarios, 10 objections, personality quadrant detection, post-session debrief.
unacceptable_result: Acceptance script exits 1; agentTurn fails due to missing updated_at column; debrief scores are absent
ownership: ARC emits machine twin; Builder executes; Adam owns founder usability verdict

point_model.A: Vision — Adam provides FP in development stage
point_model.B: Chair locks handoff — corridor protected; Adam done until Alpha
